mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PREMIUM_CALC_LOG ( LOG_SEQ, AGE, GENDER, JOB_CLASS, DISEASE_CODE, DISEASE_HISTORY, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, SMOKE_YN, DRINK_FREQ, RESULT_MSG, PREMIUM, CALC_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_PREMIUM_CALC.NEXTVAL, #{age}, #{gender}, #{jobClass}, #{diseaseCode}, #{diseaseHistory}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{smokeYn}, #{drinkFreq}, #{resultMsg}, #{premium}, SYSDATE )
